title: Silence From The Grave pays discard-magic cost before chain

card.rawText: Discard 1 magic card to the cemetery to play this card. Destroy all magic cards on the field. For 2 turn cycles, your opponent cannot play magic cards and their creature effects are negated during your turn. The opponent may still respond with a valid Lightning card before this card resolves.

plan.title: Silence From The Grave pays discard-magic cost before chain
plan.summary: Play Silence From The Grave with another Magic card in hand and verify the discard cost is prompted and paid before the Magic Chain starts.

notes: Keep Health Potion in player_1 hand as the required discard-Magic cost.

steps: Player 1 plays Silence From The Grave.
Resolve the pre-chain cost prompt by discarding Health Potion.
manualVerification: Confirm Silence itself cannot be discarded for its own cost and opponent priority begins only after the cost is paid.
riskNotes: The discard is a pre-chain cost, not a negatable effect.

coverageSuggestion.notes: Verify required Magic discard cost before Silence enters the Magic Chain.

runnerNotes: Create a dev match from plan.setup, execute plan.steps, then verify plan.expectedAssertions.
The deterministic engine and manual QA status remain source of truth.
